leadText: Not to be confused with Memorial Pillar. Memorial Hill (Japanese: メモリアルヒル Memorial Hill) is a location on Akala Island in Alola, located east of Route 9 and west of Akala Outskirts.

sections.title: Geography
sections.text: Geography [ edit | edit source ] Memorial Hill is a burial site for the old, mighty families of Alola. It is said to have been established at this site due to the proximity of the Ruins of Life to the north, the belief being that those buried here wanted to be laid to rest close to the Akala Island guardian deity , Tapu Lele . Being the most notable gravesite in Alola, people from all over the region tend to travel here to see the graves. Some of these people are Trainers , ready to challenge others like them to battle . Appropriately for the setting, Ghost-type Pokémon can commonly be found in the tall grass here. After visiting Olivia 's shop in Konikoni City , the player will encounter an Aether Foundation Employee and Faba here, trying to stop Team Skull from stealing a Slowpoke . After Team Skull is driven away, Faba invites the player to come visit Aether Paradise once they've completed their next grand trial .
